zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Skarlett於1500年出生在英國薩默塞特查爾頓時，他的父親Daniel Skarlett27歲，母親Mrs. Daniel Skarlett26歲。他與Dorothy Woot在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1594年11月4日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓享年94歲。

nameMeanings.name: Skarlett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a nickname for someone who made or sold bright, rich fabrics, from Middle English scarlet ‘scarlet (cloth)’ (Old French escarlate, Late Latin scarlata).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Skarlett was born in 1500, in Charlton, Somerset, England, his father, Daniel Skarlett, was 27 and his mother, Mrs. Daniel Skarlett, was 26. He married Dorothy Woot in Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 4 November 1594, in Charlton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Skarlett est né en 1500, à Charlton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Daniel Skarlett, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Daniel Skarlett, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Woot à Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 novembre 1594, à Charlton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Skarlett(이)가 1500년 영국 서머세트 찰턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Daniel Skarlett(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Daniel Skarlett(은)는 26세였다. 그는 영국 서머세트 찰턴 맥크렐에서 Dorothy Woot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1594년 11월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.
